headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -96.2)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 80% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 150 quotes and an overwhelming 133 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction today.

• Despite the drop from yesterday's peak, this remains near the top of the 112-day range and well above typical levels.

• Both fears and optimism stayed deeply negative, with fears showing a notable decline from yesterday.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
